title: Acianthera welsiae-windischiae
taxonomy: Acianthera welsiae-windischiae is classified within the plant family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Acianthera. This orchid is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae. The species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Acianthera welsiae-windischiae is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support.
